query: ESTRO MRI QA protocol radiation therapy brachytherapy

results.title: ESTRO ACROP consensus guideline on CT- and MRI-based target volume delineation for primary radiation therapy of localized prostate cancer.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 29496279. 2018/04/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Delineation of clinical target volumes (CTVs) remains a 
weak link in radiation therapy (RT), and large inter-observer variation is seen. 
Guidelines for target and organs at risk delineation for prostate cancer in the 
primary setting are scarce. The aim was to develop a delineation guideline 
obtained by consensus between a broad European group of radiation oncologists.
MATERIAL AND METHODS: An ESTRO contouring consensus panel consisting of leadi
